item.text: {"version":"1","sourceSproutId":"sprout_b9fd056e1923a33a","guidancePath":"AGENTS.md","enforcementPath":"scripts/check-generated-files.ts","testPath":"tests/generated-policy.test.ts","packageScript":"check:generated","observational":true,"reusesPureGenerator":true,"comparisonStrategy":"complete_byte_equality","changedPaths":["AGENTS.md","package.json","scripts/check-generated-files.ts","tests/generated-policy.test.ts"],"summary":"The repository exposes renderGeneratedClient as a pure renderer, so the enforcement can compare its complete in-memory UTF-8 output against the committed client Buffer without invoking the write-capable generator entry point."}
